step: Given the user is on the application login page
When the user enters "{username}" into the username field
And the user enters "{password}" into the password field
Then the user should be redirected to the dashboard page
When the user completes the registration form with valid details
When the user fills the "{field_label}" field with "{value}"
When the user selects "{option}" from the "{dropdown_label}" dropdown
When the user scrolls to the bottom of the page
And the user clicks the "{button_name}" button
Then the text "{expected_text}" should be visible on the page
Given the banking customer accesses the secure authentication gateway
Then multi factor authentication should be enforced
When the customer initiates an NEFT transfer of {amount} INR
Then a transaction reference number should be generated
When the customer uploads Aadhaar document for verification
When the applicant submits a personal loan request for {loan_amount} INR
Then the EMI schedule should be displayed
When a POST request is sent to "/api/v1/transfer" with valid payload
Then the AML screening result should be Cleared
When the admin downloads the monthly transaction report

Given the user navigates to the ParaBank login page
When the user enters "{username}" into the Username field
And the user enters "{password}" into the Password field
And the user clicks the "Login" button
Then the Accounts Overview page should be displayed
When the user navigates to "Open New Account"
When the user navigates to "Accounts Overview"
When the user navigates to "Transfer Funds"
When the user navigates to "Bill Pay"
When the user navigates to "Find Transactions"
When the user navigates to "Update Contact Info"
When the user navigates to "Request Loan"
When the user selects "{from_account}" from the From Account dropdown
And the user selects "{to_account}" from the To Account dropdown
And the user enters "{amount}" into the Amount field
And the user submits the transfer
Then the transfer confirmation message should appear
When the user fills the Payee Name with "{payee}"
And the user fills the Address with "{address}"
And the user enters "{amount}" into the payment amount field
And the user submits the bill payment
Then the payment confirmation message should appear
When the user searches transactions by amount "{amount}"
Then the transaction results should be displayed
When the user enters "{loan_amount}" as loan amount
And the user enters "{down_payment}" as down payment
And the user submits the loan request
Then the loan request result should be displayed
When the user updates the address with "{address}"
And the user saves the contact information
Then the contact update confirmation should appear
When the user logs out of the application
Then the login page should be visible again
